demographics.living_situation: lives at home; adult daughter present and helping

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I've had this terrible, constant pain under my right ribs since dinner last night, and it shoots straight through to my right shoulder. I keep vomiting and I can't keep anything down.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain hasn't let up all night — it's much worse and longer than the twinges I've had before, and now I'm bringing everything up and feeling hot and shivery.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 8 hours ago, not long after a fatty dinner last night
symptom_narrative.duration: constant for around 8 hours and hasn't eased at all
symptom_narrative.character: a deep, gripping, boring pain that is always there — not coming and going like before
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been; I'm guarding my right side and taking shallow breaths because deep breaths make it jab
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: high up under my right ribs, and it shoots through to the tip of my right shoulder
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: continuous since last night — it will not settle no matter what I do
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has helped; lying still is the only thing I can manage
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: taking a deep breath and any movement make it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: lots of nausea and I've vomited three times (greenish/bitter), no appetite at all, and I've been going hot then shivery with sweats
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had short bouts of pain here before after rich meals, but they always passed in an hour or so — this one is completely different
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can barely move around; my daughter is having to help me and I can't keep any fluids down

past_medical_history.how_managed: takes a tablet for it every day

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: occasional short episodes of pain in the same spot after fatty food in the past

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: at home with her adult daughter present, who made the call and is helping her

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer

objective_data_offered.value: daughter says she looks flushed and sweaty, is holding her right side and only taking little shallow breaths
daughter reports she has vomited three times into a bowl at the bedside and cannot keep sips of water down
